title: History (Η)
description: How we got here - evolutions, timelines, legacy patterns

us-001-to-us-002-evolution.from: US-001: Partial entity implementation (canonical + data only)
us-001-to-us-002-evolution.to: US-002: Full-stack entity implementation (canonical + data + API + UI)
us-001-to-us-002-evolution.change: Scope expanded to include API registration and UI layer
us-001-to-us-002-evolution.trigger: US-001 left Product in 'upcoming' status, not immediately usable

timeline.state: Product entity: canonical + data layers only, ProductController exists but not registered

timeline.decision: Include all 4 layers from the start

timeline.state: Account entity: canonical + data + API (registered) + UI, immediately usable

us-001-to-us-002-evolution.impact: HIGH - establishes full-stack story pattern for future entities

loom-autonomous-execution-maturity.from: Manual story execution with human intervention
loom-autonomous-execution-maturity.to: Fully autonomous execution with parallel task strategy
loom-autonomous-execution-maturity.change: 25 tasks completed autonomously across 4 specialized agents

timeline.event: Early Loom stories required frequent human decisions

timeline.state: 25/25 tasks completed without human intervention, parallel execution strategy
